news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% This Week
news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主因新晋DEX交易量增长。
news.summary_en: Solana's total value locked rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXs, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap
news.summary_zh: IOG团队发布Plutus V4技术路线图，预计2026年Q3上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released the Plutus V4 roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, with enhanced smart contract expressiveness and lower fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Major Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展多链互操作性。
news.summary_en: Chainlink CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding cross-chain interoperability for developers and users.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币核心开发者提议ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling Solution
news.summary_zh: 狗狗币基金会研究小组发布草案，探讨基于ZK-Rollup的Layer2方案，旨在降低小额转账手续费。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation research group released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 scaling solution aimed at reducing fees for small transactions.
